key_components: Collapsed dot indicator for online state

patterns_discovered.description: Uses SyncState sealed class for type-safe state representation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Exhaustive when compilation and type safety

patterns_discovered.description: Inflates component_sync_status_bar layout in init block
patterns_discovered.benefit: Separation of layout definition from view logic

patterns_discovered.description: Toggles View.VISIBLE/View.GONE based on state transitions
showOfflineState(), showSyncingState(), showOnlineState() encapsulate state logic

gotchas_discovered.description: Layout file (R.layout.component_sync_status_bar) and color resources (sync_offline_amber, sync_syncing_blue) must exist
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify layout XML file and color definitions in colors.xml

gotchas_discovered.description: Progress bar requires explicit mode switching between indeterminate and determinate based on progress value
Singular vs plural handling for pending count ('1 change' vs 'N changes')
gotchas_discovered.note: Currently handled, but consider using plurals.xml for localization

gotchas_discovered.description: Assumes all child views with specified IDs exist in layout file
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Will throw NullPointerException if IDs missing

approach_outcome.completion_metric: Full implementation of SyncStatusBar custom view component
quality_factors: Comprehensive KDoc documentation with usage examples
Sealed class integration for type-safe state handling
Proper view lifecycle management in constructor
deliverables: Support for three sync states with distinct visuals

recommendations.description: Define expandedContainer (LinearLayout), statusText (TextView), progressBar (ProgressBar), and collapsedDot (View) elements
Add sync_offline_amber, sync_syncing_blue, and appropriate online indicator colors
Consider adding lifecycle-aware components for progress updates in syncing state
recommendations.rationale: Prevents memory leaks and improves resource management

recommendations.description: Test state transitions, visibility changes, and text updates for all three states
Move plural strings to plurals.xml for multi-language support
recommendations.example: Use pluralsResource instead of manual singular/plural logic

recommendations.description: Consider animated transitions between states for better UX
